title: Israel Denies That It Is Running Out of Missile Interceptors
summary_full: Israeli military says it had prepared for a prolonged conflict after a news report said its supplies of ballistic missile interceptors were running “critically low.”
summary_public: Israeli military says it had prepared for a prolonged conflict after a news report said its supplies of ballistic missile interceptors were running “critically low.”

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: Israel Denies That It Is Running Out of Missile Interceptors
